data.content:
Plan (implementation already on origin/main):

Step 1 — Centralize the contract in code
  - src/write_dispatch/helpers.rs:
    - warn_deprecated_agent_metadata(command, supplied_flags, lease_bound) — three-line stderr warning
    - lease_state_actor(app, knot_id, actor_kind) — builds StateActorMetadata from resolve_lease_agent_info
    - state_actor_from_agent_info(actor_kind, &agent_info) — agent_info → StateActorMetadata
    - supplied_agent_flag_names(name, model, version) — names of flags the caller passed
  Done: commit b8b9759.

Step 2 — Rewire every identity sink
  - execute_next, execute_rollback, execute_claim, execute_poll_claim, execute_gate_evaluate,
    execute_step_annotate, execute_state, build_note_input, build_handoff_input all emit the
    warning when deprecated flags are supplied and derive agent identity from the lease only.
  Done: commit b8b9759 (execute_state gap closed in the same commit pre-push).

Step 3 — CLI help + tests + docs
  - [DEPRECATED — IGNORED] prefix on every deprecated flag's clap help string (cli_agent.rs,
    cli_ops.rs).
  - tests_lease_deprecation.rs: 9 tests covering each sink for lease-sourced identity,
    bogus-flag override, and no-lease path.
  - docs/leases.md + README.md rewritten to frame lease as the declared source.
  Done: commits fbfe76f (docs) and b8b9759 (CLI + tests).

Step 4 — Grammar polish
  - Singular wording in the warning helper ("is deprecated"/"this value is ignored") vs plural
    ("are deprecated"/"these values are ignored").
  Done: commit d5ecb30.

Step 5 — Foolery client compliance (out of knots repo, tracked in this knot for AC7)
  - src/lib/knots-operations.ts: drop --agent-*/--note-agent*/--handoff-agent* pushes in
    claimKnot, pollKnot, appendNoteArgs, appendHandoffArgs; drop the hardcoded "foolery"
    default; drop KnotUpdateInput agent fields. createLease unchanged.
  - Callers in execution-backend-helpers.ts, backends/knots-backend-prompts.ts, execution-backend.ts
    stop threading agent fields.
  - Tests flipped to assert flags absent.
  Done: foolery commits c2756326 (docs), d23064d2 (client), 68a3a881 (tests).

Quality gates (AC8)
  - Knots: cargo fmt clean; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings clean;
    cargo test 1111 unit + all integration green; 9/9 tests_lease_deprecation green;
    coverage 95.14%.
  - Foolery: bun run lint / bunx tsc --noEmit / bun run test (2734 passed) / bun run build clean.

Verification (V1-V7)
  - V1/V2/V3 executed against the built release binary: lease identity wins, bogus ignored,
    no-lease branch fires correctly. V4 is covered by tests_lease_deprecation (all sinks).
  - V5/V6 require the new kno release to land on the Foolery host; V7 satisfied by Agent B
    cleanup already on origin/main.
